data.title: GROW Investment Group Secures ipa from ADGM's FSRA, Marking a Key Milestone in Its Middle East Expansion
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Abu Dhabi, the GROW Investment Group (GIG), a prominent Chinese global asset manager overseeing around $1.5 billion in global assets, disclosed that it has been granted In-Principle Approval (IPA) by ADGM's Financial Services Regulatory.

data.title: Behind the Three-Year Dominance: Unilumin's Counter-Cyclical Expansion
data.description: In Shenzen, China, as of April 29, 2026, Unilumin has secured its rank as the leading revenue generator among listed LED display firms for three years running. Despite a modest 1.2% expansion in the global market, Unilumin exceeded CNY 8 billion in revenue in 2025. This impressive feat underscores their consistent outperformance in the industry.

data.title: Bille Partners with BizScout to Bring Insured Warranties to Main Street Acquisitions
data.description: In Stockholm on April 29, 2026, Bille has been announced as the sole R&W insurance partner for BizScout, an acquisition marketplace established by Codie Sanchez. BizScout recently secured a $5 million investment from the creators of Tinder and Coinbase. As a result, insurance coverage is now integrated into the BizScout deal process, enhancing its offerings.

data.title: Polymarket refutes data breach allegation, hacker selling public data. Hacker plans to release breached data soon.
data.description: The individual who apparently hacked the system stated that they were able to access other prediction markets and intends to publish the information within the coming days.

data.title: Aptos introduces a privacy coin to enhance onchain transactions; shields treasury moves & trading strategies from competitors.
data.description: A company, Aptos, has announced the launch of a privacy coin that aims to facilitate secure on-chain transactions for businesses. This coin is designed to prevent competitors from tracking the movements of a company's treasury and trading strategies. The implementation of this privacy coin could provide businesses with an added layer of confidentiality in their financial transactions, potentially safeguarding sensitive information.

data.title: UPM Interim Report Q1 2026: Good start to the year - excellent performance in decarbonization solutions
data.description: On April 29, 2026, UPM-Kymmene Corporation released its Interim Report for Q1 2026 at 09:45 EEST in Helsinki. The report highlighted a positive start to the year, particularly noting excellent performance in decarbonization solutions. Sales for Q1 2026 reached €2,505 million.

data.title: Meta faces charges in Europe for allowing children on Instagram and Facebook due to ineffective age verification controls.
data.description: European Union regulators have stated that the company failed to implement proper controls to verify a user's self-declared date of birth, thus breaching an online safety law. This lack of effective measures raised concerns regarding the company's compliance with regulatory standards, particularly in ensuring user data accuracy and protection. The company could potentially face penalties or fines for this breach, which could significantly impact its operations and reputation. This violation underscores the importance of adhering to strict online safety regulations to safeguard user information and prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: Vonage Named a Leader in the 2026 IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Communications Engagement Platforms
data.description: Vonage, under Ericsson, has been named a leader in the 2026 IDC MarketScape for Worldwide Communications Engagement Platforms sector. This acknowledgment highlights Vonage's expansive communication platform that allows companies to enhance customer and employee interaction on a global level. The IDC MarketScape report positions Vonage as a leader in this realm, recognizing their ability to revolutionize engagement for enterprises.

data.title: Temu and QIMA Partner to Strengthen Product Testing and Platform Compliance
data.description: In Dublin on April 29, 2026, Temu, a prominent global e-commerce platform, and QIMA, a leading company specializing in testing, inspection, and certification, revealed a collaborative effort to enhance product compliance and safety measures on the Temu platform. This partnership will involve QIMA providing testing services to ensure the adherence of products to regulatory standards. The initiative aims to bolster trust among consumers by assuring the safety and compliance of products offered on the Temu platform.

data.title: InCoax strengthens D-series platform for large apartment buildings
data.description: A new MoCA Access™ 2.5 DPU called the D2508 ER has been launched by InCoax Networks AB in Lund, Sweden. This device aims to expand fiber-based broadband services across in-building coaxial networks within mid- to large-sized multi-dwelling units (MDUs). The D2508 ER marks the initial release in a series of new DPUs designed for this purpose.
